prompt: Save Jane Doe at Acme Robotics (jane@acmerobotics.com) as a contact.
Notify me the moment any deal's stage changes.
rubricNote: No CRM-entity event source exists. Nearest real route: a scheduled digest workflow over listDeals, or a task-tag convention. Any proposed trigger must validate.

prompt: Import my whole CRM from this 40MB CSV and auto-dedupe everything against existing contacts.
rubricNote: Grounding against real ingest/file limits (18-25MB class caps, upload flow). The failure is inventing an import pipeline or accepting the 40MB claim uncritically.

prompt: Link Jane Doe to the Acme Robotics renewal deal.
rubricNote: Two-step native route: resolve the contact/deal ids (list/get) then createEdge. Starting the lookup is correct; refusing the link is the failure.
